title: Contract Incentive Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for calculating contract incentive payouts based on performance metrics, quality, delivery, and cost efficiency. Aligns with ISO 9001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Actual Throughput (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm döneminde üretilen veya teslim edilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Messzeitraum produzierten oder gelieferten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites ou livrées pendant la période de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades totales producidas o entregadas en el período de medición.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الوحدات المنتجة أو المسلمة في فترة القياس.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Parts per million defective, measured per Six Sigma standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts per million defective, measured per Six Sigma standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altı Sigma standartlarına göre ölçülen milyonda hatalı parça sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Teile pro Million fehlerhaft, gemessen nach Six Sigma-Standards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pièces par million défectueuses, mesurées selon les normes Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Partes por millón defectuosas, medidas según estándares Seis Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الأجزاء المعيبة لكل مليون، مقاسة وفقًا لمعايير ستة سيجما.

inputs.label: On-Time Delivery (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vaat edilen tarihte veya öncesinde teslim edilen siparişlerin yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Bestellungen, die am oder vor dem versprochenen Datum geliefert wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de commandes livrées à la date promise ou avant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de pedidos entregados en la fecha prometida o antes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الطلبات المسلمة في أو قبل التاريخ الموعود.

inputs.label: Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Total manufacturing cost per unit, including materials, labor, overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total manufacturing cost per unit, including materials, labor, overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme, işçilik ve genel giderler dahil birim başına toplam üretim maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Herstellkosten pro Einheit, einschließlich Material, Arbeit, Gemeinkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de fabrication total par unité, incluant matériaux, main-d'œuvre, frais généraux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de fabricación por unidad, incluyendo materiales, mano de obra y gastos generales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي تكلفة التصنيع لكل وحدة، بما في ذلك المواد والعمالة والتكاليف العامة.

inputs.label: Target Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Contractually agreed cost target per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Contractually agreed cost target per unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sözleşmeyle belirlenen birim başına hedef maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Objetivo de costo por unidad acordado contractualmente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: هدف التكلفة المتفق عليه تعاقديًا لكل وحدة.

inputs.label: Incentive Base Rate ($/unit)
inputs.businessContext: Base incentive amount per unit, subject to performance multipliers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Base incentive amount per unit, subject to performance multipliers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Performans çarpanlarına tabi olan birim başına temel teşvik tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant incitatif de base par unité, soumis aux multiplicateurs de performance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto base de incentivo por unidad, sujeto a multiplicadores de rendimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مبلغ الحافز الأساسي لكل وحدة، خاضع لمضاعفات الأداء.

inputs.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum defect rate to qualify for any incentive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum defect rate to qualify for any incentive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir teşvik için gereken maksimum hata oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Fehlerrate, um für einen Anreiz in Frage zu kommen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de défauts maximum pour être éligible à une incitation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa máxima de defectos para calificar para cualquier incentivo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى لمعدل العيوب للتأهل لأي حافز.

rules.message: Throughput values must be non-negative and target must be positive.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 1,000,000 ppm.
On-time delivery percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Cost per unit must be non-negative and target must be positive.
Incentive base rate must be non-negative.
Cost reduction sharing percentage must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds quality threshold. Incentive may be reduced or null.
On-time delivery below threshold. Incentive may be reduced or null.
Cost per unit exceeds target. Cost reduction sharing will not apply.
Throughput is less than 80% of target. Consider capacity improvement.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
